visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short black hair wearing a green sweatshirt with a white graphic is seated on a brown leather couch in a studio. He is holding a white script and speaking animatedly, gesturing with his right hand while leaning back comfortably. The background features light-colored curtains and shelves filled with various colorful figurines and merchandise. (2) The scene cuts to a young woman with long black hair wearing a grey hoodie and professional headphones. She is hugging a white pillow on the same couch and laughing heartily, with her eyes closed in joy. A bottle with a straw sits on the table in front of her. (3) A man in a red sweater is shown briefly, holding a pillow and pointing his finger as if asking a question. He is also seated in the same lounge area. (4) The camera returns to the man in the green sweatshirt. He becomes more expressive, pointing upwards and mimicking an action with his hands. Suddenly, multiple digital overlays of his own face screaming appear around him, emphasizing a comedic moment in his story. (5) A different man with glasses and a black turtleneck sweater is shown sitting on the couch. He rests his hands on a decorative pillow and speaks calmly to the camera while smiling slightly. (6) The final phase shows the man in the black sweater looking distressed, holding his head with both hands as a large text overlay appears in the center of the screen with a cartoonish face logo.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 阿丹就是. (2) [Subtitle]: 這七八年就是. (3) [Subtitle]: 長年被那個. (4) [Subtitle]: 毛囊炎. (5) [Subtitle]: 俗稱釘子. (6) [Subtitle]: 困擾. (7) [Subtitle]: 簡直就是專業的那個. (8) [Subtitle]: 釘子戶. (9) [Variety]: 嘿嘿. (10) [Subtitle]: 那你走路會一直摩到嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: 不是阿丹阿丹. (12) [Subtitle]: 我朋友. (13) [Subtitle]: 阿丹. (14) [Subtitle]: 阿丹走路會摩到嗎. (15) [Subtitle]: 還曾經就是. (16) [Subtitle]: 帶著學生. (17) [Subtitle]: 去騎腳踏車. (18) [Variety]: 哈哈. (19) [Subtitle]: 在那摩啊摩摩啊摩的. (20) [Variety]: 哦好痛喔. (21) [Subtitle]: 就這樣總不是辦法啊. (22) [Subtitle]: 就想說要去看那個皮膚科. (23) [Subtitle]: 就帶著手套嘛. (24) [Subtitle]: 劈啪劈啪. (25) [Subtitle]: 用擠的. (26) [Variety]: 嗚哇啊啊啊. (27) [Subtitle]: 醫生就開始講說. (28) [Subtitle]: 你是何雅雯嗎. (29) [Subtitle]: 我就說對對對對對. (30) [Subtitle]: 好褲子脫掉檢查. (31) [Subtitle]: 我想說撞到頭腦. (32) [Subtitle]: 為什麼要脫褲子檢查. (33) [Variety]: 那你蠻清醒的. (34) [Subtitle]: 不對不對我先去跟那個. (35) [Subtitle]: 護理站確認一下. (36) [Subtitle]: 當天當下那個狀況. (37) [Subtitle]: 有兩個我都去了急診. (38) [Subtitle]: 但是那個. (39) [Subtitle]: 另外一個需要脫褲子的. (40) [Subtitle]: 因為那好像是照婦科. (41) [Subtitle]: 我想說小寶寶流產. (42) [Subtitle]: 我都不知道我自己懷孕. (43) [Slogan]: 完整影片請上大頭佛工作室頻道收看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main speaker in green, 1 woman laughing, 1 man in red, 1 man in black with glasses.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man in a green 'LET'S PLAY WITH' graphic sweatshirt, and another man with glasses in a black textured turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional but cozy studio lounge with light beige leather sofas, decorative patterned pillows, and background shelving displaying pop-culture figurines and collectibles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking with a friendly, energetic tone at a rapid pace over a light, upbeat acoustic guitar and piano backing track. His speech is clear and focused, punctuated by brief melodic flourishes in the background music. (2) A clear, resonant sound of female laughter erupts, accompanied by a slight swell in the background music's volume, creating a high-arousal comedic atmosphere. (3) A second male voice interjects with a questioning inflection, followed by the first speaker resuming his story with increased vocal variety and animated pitch shifts. (4) A sudden, loud stylized vocal scream effect occurs at approximately 0:30, marking a peak in narrative energy, followed by rapid-fire speech and layered laughter. (5) A third male voice begins a new story segment with a slightly deeper pitch and calm but humorous tone. The background music continues as a steady, optimistic bed. (6) The audio concludes with a mixture of collective laughter and a final high-pitched cartoon-style sound effect as the speech ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Anecdote A -> Transition -> Anecdote B -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an entertaining storytelling piece where the hosts share humorous medical mishaps. The first story involves a skin condition and a biking accident, while the second relates a bizarre misunderstanding during a hospital visit regarding identity and a pregnancy check-up, aimed at evoking laughter from the audience through relatable but absurd life experiences.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality studio talk-show format with social-media optimized editing and high engagement cues.
